title: Christmas Dimension RP
description: The official resource pack for the Christmas Dimension datapack, adding custom textures for holiday items.
body:
This is the **companion Resource Pack** for the **Christmas Dimension** datapack. It provides the essential visual components to bring the North Pole to life!

While the datapack handles the world generation and mechanics, this resource pack ensures that all custom items have their intended festive appearance.

### 🎄 Features

- Custom textures for the **Candy Cane Sword**.
- Textures for **Red, Lime, and White Gumdrops**.
- **Gingerbread Man** item texture.
- Custom models and textures required by the Christmas Dimension structures and mobs.

### 📥 Installation

1.  Download the `Christmas_Dimension_RP_X.X.zip`.
2.  Place the file into your Minecraft `resourcepacks` folder.
3.  Launch Minecraft and go to **Options > Resource Packs**.
4.  Move the pack to the **Selected** column.
5.  Make sure you also have the **Christmas Dimension Datapack** installed in your world!
